# Rubric Suggestion Seed

This synthetic source can be used to test teacher-approved rubric suggestion workflows.

## Suggested Criteria

### Correctness

Measures whether the functions produce the expected values for normal inputs, boundary cases, and empty score lists.

### Completeness

Measures whether all required functions are present and whether `score_report` includes the expected keys.

### Clarity

Measures whether the code is easy to read, uses clear names, and avoids unnecessary complexity.

## Suggested Performance Levels

- Meets: satisfies the assignment requirements with clear, reliable code.
- Partial: satisfies the main path but misses one requirement or edge case.
- Needs revision: misses core behavior, has syntax errors, or cannot be evaluated.

## Approval Boundary

These suggestions should remain draft guidance until a teacher accepts or edits them.
